tagline: كول نكس - COOL NEX - Your trusted marine contracting partner in Saudi Arabia.
heroSubtitle: كول نكس - COOL NEX is one of the leading companies in the KSA market in protective coatings, abrasive blasting, onshore & offshore works, corrosion protection, thermal insulation, and equipment maintenance.
heroSupportingText: We provide integrated marine contracting services across Saudi Arabia, specializing in maintenance, protection, and safety for ships and industrial facilities.
aboutDescription: كول نكس - COOL NEX provides comprehensive marine and industrial contracting services, including protective coatings, corrosion protection, thermal insulation, and equipment maintenance in Saudi Arabia.
metaTitle: كول نكس - COOL NEX | Marine Contracting Saudi Arabia
